title: Vildar Blin

{{Quote|Come on!|Colonel Ledick Firest orders Vildar Blin to charge a downed AT-AT at the Battle of Hoth|<ref name="ESB" />}}
'''Vildar Blin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] and [[Scout/Legends|scout]] of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After his [[Vildar Blin's brother|brother]] betrayed their family by joining the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]], Blin joined the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector's]] [[Bormea sector Rebel underground|Rebel underground]], and he later served with [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] at its [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] headquarters on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Blin was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] while storming a downed [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] that exploded as a result of friendly [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]] fire.

==Biography==
[[File:BlinandAssociate.png|thumb|left|280px|Vildar Blin and his assistant charge the downed AT-AT while Rebel snowpeeders pass overhead.]]
Vildar Blin was once a member of the [[Corulag security force|local security force]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]],<ref name="Who's Who" /> in the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="CSWE-Corulag">{{CSWECite|I|146|Corulag}}</ref> However, Blin joined the [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] [[Bormea sector Rebel underground|Rebel underground]]<ref name="Who's Who" /> after his [[Vildar Blin's brother|brother]] betrayed their family by joining the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]].<ref name="CSWE-Blin" /> Eventually, Blin was assigned to the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] headquarters of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the<ref name="Who's Who" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Water/Legends|ice]] planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], where he served with [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] as a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]].<ref name="Who's Who" />

During the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="ESB novel">[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]]</ref> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] worst battlefield defeat of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="CSWE-Battle of Hoth">{{CSWECite|II|62|Hoth, Battle of}}</ref> Blin fought in the defensive trenches surrounding Echo Base,<ref name="ESB novel" /> under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]].<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref> Trained in reconnaissance, Blin helped spot for the Rebels' [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] and marked for capture any salvageable Imperial equipment from fallen [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]].<ref name="Who's Who" />

In the skies above the trenches, [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Group]] [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] downed [[Blizzard 2/Legends|one]] of the AT-ATs by ensnaring its legs with high-tension [[Power harpoon launcher|cable]] from his [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]], or "[[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]]," tripping it to the ground, the first Imperial [[Walker/Legends|walker]] neutralized during the battle. Blin and an [[Vildar Blin's assistant|assistant]] boisterously stormed out of the trenches at Firest's behest for the grounded AT-AT.<ref name="Who's Who" /> They reached the walker before any Imperials could emerge and were about to enter the AT-AT<ref name="ESB novel" /> when a snowspeeder [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] fired upon the vulnerable walker, destroying it.<ref name="Who's Who" /> Large chunks of shrapnel flung the Rebel [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] backward,<ref name="ESB novel" /> and Blin and his assistant were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the explosion.<ref name="Who's Who" />

==Personality and traits==
Vildar Blin served the Rebel Alliance Special Forces as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]]. Even before joining the Alliance, he had prior training in first-response tactics and already boasted [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] experience. As such, Blin was regularly assigned to reconnaissance missions,<ref name="Hoth Limited">{{CCG|set=Hoth Limited|cardname=Rebel Scout}}</ref> which encompassed his artillery observation and salvage duties at the Battle of Hoth. Blin, a [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="Who's Who" /> sported a beard of [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the Hoth battle and had light skin.<ref name="ESB" />

==Equipment==
During the Battle of Hoth, Blin wore the standard [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|cold-weather armor]] of the Echo Base field [[Troop/Legends|troops]], including [[Alliance Cold Weather Headgear|headgear]], [[Anti-glare goggles/Legends|anti-glare goggles]], padded vest, [[thermal flak jacket]], gloves, belt, leggings, boots, and [[Alliance Cold Weather Backpack/Legends|backpack]]. His equipment also included [[Binoculars/Legends|binoculars]], and he carried a sizable piece of equipment during his ill-fated charge of the downed AT-AT during the battle.<ref name="ESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vildar Blin appears briefly in the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], running across the Hoth plains for the first downed AT-AT walker at the Battle of Hoth, before the shot cuts to an explosion of the walker.<ref name="ESB" /> The character's identity and role as a first-response scout were created for the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Hoth-Light/large/rebelscout.gif "Rebel Scout" card] as part of the [[November]] [[1996]] ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Hoth Limited" />

Blin's backstory was later expounded upon in the [[2004]] article [[Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth|''Who's Who in Echo Base'']] in [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]], the first source to confirm his death in the walker explosion. Blin's death in the ''Who's Who'' article draws upon<ref name="Who's Who" /> a scene that appears in [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]], in which a group of Rebels charge the downed AT-AT and are subsequently caught in its explosion. However, in the novelization, the AT-AT explodes from within rather than from Rebel snowspeeder fire.<ref name="ESB novel" />
